title.en: AI release notes generator with GitHub Actions: Guide
title.es: Generador AI de notas de versión con GitHub Actions: Guía

excerpt.en: Build an AI release notes generator with GitHub Actions to automate changelogs and summarize PRs into concise release notes from commits and PR metadata.
excerpt.es: Aprende a construir un generador AI de notas de versión con GitHub Actions para automatizar changelogs y resumir PRs en notas claras a partir de commits y metadatos.

author: DevAI Team
imagePrompt: Create a horizontal editorial hero illustration for a modern developer blog. Use a restrained visual system aligned to the site design: crisp white or light neutral background, deep charcoal shadows, and green accent lighting close to emerald terminal green. Compose the scene with one clear technical focal point related to AI-generated release notes and CI/CD—such as an abstracted terminal or code panel emitting structured lines representing notes—plus subtle supporting abstract shapes, grids, panels, or code-inspired geometry. Use clean depth, soft gradients, elegant contrast, and intentional negative space so headlines could sit on top if needed. Style should feel premium, minimal, sharp, and consistent across articles. Do not include logos, brand marks, screenshots, UI chrome, watermarks, or readable text inside the image. Avoid cartoonish styles, stock-photo look, random colors, busy scenes, and inconsistent visual metaphors.
